subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! Be not grieved by that which hath befallen thee from the decree of God, the Lord of Lords. Render thanks unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه لاتحزن عما ورد علیک من قضاء الله رب الارباب اشکره
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude
